modal.costWarning: A longer time window and more participations with activity in that window increase runtime and place a greater strain on model and server resources. The analysis executes in the background and may take a long time. Choose the narrowest range that still fits your review goal. The assessment is LLM-generated and can be wrong — verify important results yourself.
